342-cleveland-st-surry-hills.exclusions_note: Other Cleveland St houses exist: 285/287/289/295 (Redfern), 390/394/398 (Surry Hills). Never match bare 'Cleveland'. The house-number-anchored pattern '342 cleveland' excludes them.
342-cleveland-st-surry-hills.room_codes_note: All derived from data; labels confirmed by Kurian 2026-07-05. Letter/second code in a room = separate BED in the same room: #1110 is Room 6B (bed B of Room 6, #1109). 6B closed since 2024 — tenant took both beds.

full_window_occupants.1106: James (in place whole window; eviction retracted, real move-out 2026-07-18 is post-window — ruling #2)

closed_rooms.1110: Room 6B closed since 2024 — Room 6 tenant takes both beds (ruling #1)

287-cleveland-st-redfern.exclusions_note: Same street: 285 Cleveland St, Redfern, Redfern; 289 Cleveland St, Redfern, Redfern; 295 Cleveland St, Redfern, Redfern; 342 Cleveland St, Surry Hills, Surry Hills; 390 Cleveland St, Surry Hills, Surry Hills
287-cleveland-st-redfern.room_codes_note: C3 (A0 gate, 2026-07-05): 038B and 039B are zero-padded BED codes. 038B = bed B of Room 4 (room code 38); 039B = bed B of Room 5 (room code 39). Letter suffix = a bed in the same-numbered room, NOT an extra room. Assumption logged in QUESTIONS-FOR-KURIAN.md; house proceeds past A0 with this documented C3 assumption.
